data.content: Implemented Stage and Retake Now buttons in the retake dialog. Stage applies state change and reject reason only. Retake Now applies state change then immediately starts a Take session (with rolling-ancestor check, existing-session detection, and graceful failure handling that preserves the staged mutation). Extracted rolling-ancestor walk into shared src/lib/rolling-ancestor.ts used by both BeatsPage and RetakesView. Fixed ancestry bug: parentByBeatId is now built from full beat set, not just retake candidates, so rolling grandparents are detected through intermediate non-retake-source parents. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 2058 tests, build).
